title: Lovable Indian Food Mod
description: Lovable Indian Food Mod adds delicious Indian dishes like Dosa, Idli, Roti, Lassi, Paneer, and Gulab Jamun to Minecraft. Each food gives unique effects, bringing authentic flavors and powerful boosts to your gameplay experience.
body:
Spice up your Minecraft world with a delicious taste of India!

This mod adds 7 iconic Indian foods:

Paneer – Adds Resistance

Gulabjamun – Grants Night Vision

Lassi – Gives Fire Resistance

Samosa – Boosts Jump

Dosa – Increases Speed

Roti – Provides Saturation

Idli – Restores Health with Regeneration

Each item has unique effects to enhance gameplay while staying true to Indian cuisine.
Craft them in survival or grab them from the creative inventory under the Food tab.
